---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for the benchmark tool
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: fam007e
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you'd like added or improved.

## Motivation / Use Case

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve for benchmarking memory latency or TLB behavior?

## Proposed Approach

If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, describe it here (optional).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional Context

Any relevant links, papers, or hardware specifics that motivated this request.

> **Note:** If this feature would also benefit the upstream project, consider opening an issue at [torvalds/test-tlb](https://github.com/torvalds/test-tlb/issues).
